items.title: Helicopters dump water as huge Norway fire destroys homes
items.dek: The blaze has destroyed more than 100 homes in Drammen and has spread to a nearby forest, authorities say.
items.body: The blaze has destroyed more than 100 homes in Drammen and has spread to a nearby forest, authorities say.

items.title: Control, threats, disfiguring surgery: My life inside Jeffrey Epstein's 'cult'
items.dek: "Anya" gives the BBC a rare account of how sex-criminal financier Epstein lured and abused his “assistants”.
